title: Probiotics After 40: Why Your Gut Bacteria Shift and How to Restore Balance
tags: probiotics, gut health, microbiome, women over 40, digestion, bloating
summary: A detailed look at why the gut microbiome shifts dramatically after 40 due to hormonal changes and aging, the connection between gut bacteria and estrogen regulation, and how targeted probiotic supplementation helps women restore balance and reduce perimenopausal symptoms.
featured_image_alt: Woman practicing yoga for gut health and overall wellness after 40
